Name: FAssetBundleEntry
Description: A struct representing a single AssetBundle

Variables.Name: BundleScope
Variables.Description: Asset this bundle is saved within. This is empty for global bundles, or in the saved bundle info

Variables.Name: BundleName
Variables.Description: Specific name of this bundle, should be unique for a given scope

Variables.Name: BundleAssets
Variables.Description: List of string assets contained in this bundle
